entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`draft_id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `provider_thread_id` INTEGER, `participant_set_key` TEXT, `body` TEXT, `subject` TEXT, `created_timestamp_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL, `updated_timestamp_ms` INTEGER NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_drafts_provider_thread_id
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_drafts_provider_thread_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`provider_thread_id`)

indices.name: index_drafts_participant_set_key
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_drafts_participant_set_key` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`participant_set_key`)

indices.name: index_drafts_updated_timestamp_ms_draft_id
indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_drafts_updated_timestamp_ms_draft_id` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`updated_timestamp_ms`, `draft_id`)

setupQueries: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS room_master_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,identity_hash TEXT)
